# PqcCore — Swift Package Manager distribution

This is the `swiftpm` branch of [pqc-mobile-client](https://github.com/sriharsha-y/pqc-mobile-client). It exists to host the `Package.swift` + Swift binding for SPM consumers; the library source lives on the `main` branch.

## Consumption

```swift
// Package.swift
dependencies: [
    .package(
        url: "https://github.com/sriharsha-y/pqc-mobile-client.git",
        from: "0.2.0"
    )
]

// Then in your target:
.target(
    name: "MyApp",
    dependencies: [
        .product(name: "PqcCore", package: "pqc-mobile-client")
    ]
)
```

Or in Xcode: **File → Add Package Dependencies…** → paste the repo URL.

## How this branch is maintained

This branch is **automatically** regenerated by the release workflow on `main`:

1. `release-please` cuts tag `v0.2.0` on `main`.
2. The release workflow builds `PqcCore-0.2.0.zip` and uploads it to the GitHub Release.
3. The `publish-swiftpm` job downloads that asset, computes its SHA256, regenerates `Package.swift` from `.github/swiftpm-template/Package.swift.in`, places `pqc.swift` into `Sources/PqcCore/`, commits to this branch, and points the `v0.2.0` tag at the new commit.

Do **not** hand-edit files on this branch — they will be overwritten on the next release. To change the template, edit `.github/swiftpm-template/` on `main`.

## See also

- `main` branch: full source.
- `PqcCore.podspec` (on `main`): CocoaPods distribution of the same artifacts.
